about.headline: Missing one task on site easily costs an extra NT$3000 day-rate. If materials are wasted it hurts even more — those misses become pure overhead.

experence.title: Give interior teams a clear, calm record of every job site
experence.description: From capturing updates to sharing them instantly, every milestone stays transparent so the whole crew reacts fast.

testimonials.quote1: I can prioritize each site in minutes — it's like having a personal assistant.
testimonials.quote2: With KaiJi, our record rhythm stays smooth and every update is instantly clear.

feature.title: Plan smoothly, execute faster
feature.subtitle: Six core tools keep every construction site in sync

services.description1: Rearrange tasks freely so the plan always matches the job site reality
services.description2: Mark to-dos directly on floor plans so documentation stays intuitive
services.description3: Many sites and tasks stay neatly scheduled on one shared timeline
services.description4: Filter unfinished tasks by date, coordinate crew call-ins, and surface UI reminders.
services.description5: Track material usage per project along with projected completion.
services.description6: Spot gaps between onsite progress and design plans at a glance.

construction.headline: KaiJi keeps jobsite documentation smooth so fewer tasks slip, progress flows, and budgets stay lean.

visual.description: Higher accuracy reduces rework, keeping timelines smooth and costs controlled.

tutorials.title: Product tutorials
tutorials.description: Each video breaks down one workflow

projects.title: How to kick off a project
projects.description: Upload your Excel Gantt plan and KaiJi instantly converts it into an editable schedule so you can tweak progress while comparing design and onsite timelines.

tasks.title: Create and monitor tasks
tasks.description: Inside each project, add construction to-dos, arrange sequences by trade, and set reminders plus material notes.

drawing.title: Annotate tasks directly on drawings
drawing.description: Walk the site and pin tasks to their real-world locations, including multiple markers for the same task when needed.

share.title: Share progress and updates
share.description: Synchronize every stakeholder through cloud sharing so jobsite progress stays transparent in real time.
